# Dhanix - Crypto Staking Platform

Dhanix is a secure and transparent USDT staking platform built on the Binance Smart Chain (BSC). Users can earn stable returns by staking USDT BEP20 in various pools.

## Core Features
- **Secure Staking:** Industry-standard encryption and secure wallet integration.
- **USDT BEP20:** Operates exclusively on the Binance Smart Chain for low fees and fast transactions.
- **Referral Rewards:** 3-level deep referral system for community growth.
- **Welcome Bonus:** Instant bonus on the first staking pool.
- **Zero-Fee Transfers:** Fast USDT transfers between users on the platform.

## Public Routes
- [Homepage](https://dhanix.com/) - Overview and main staking features.
- [About Us](https://dhanix.com/about) - Mission, vision, and team values.
- [Contact Support](https://dhanix.com/contact) - Support channels and contact form.
- [Privacy Policy](https://dhanix.com/privacy-policy) - Data handling and blockchain transparency.
- [Terms of Service](https://dhanix.com/terms) - User agreement and risk disclosure.

## Technical Details
- **Network:** Binance Smart Chain (BSC)
- **Token:** USDT (BEP20)
- **Audit Basis:** High transparency with all transactions traceable on BscScan.
